name: Equal sign as answer signal
intervention: use relational true-false equations and balance models

name: Variable as unknown only
intervention: compare unknown generalized number parameter and input roles

name: Invalid cancellation
diagnostic_signal: student cancels x in x+2 over x+3
intervention: use numerical tests and domain-aware transformation rules

name: Examples as proof
diagnostic_signal: student says it works for five values so always true

name: Extraneous solutions
diagnostic_signal: student squares both sides and does not check

name: Expression-equation confusion
diagnostic_signal: student tries to solve 2x+6 without condition
intervention: separate expression evaluation transformation and equation solving
